notes: Draft OWM written to outputs/draft.owm; final map + analysis in outputs/output.md.
Validator and layout-checker are Node scripts; sandbox blocked `node <script.mjs>` invocations in this session (only `node --version` succeeded).

Validator's three rules (coord range, endpoint declaration, visibility a>=b) were checked manually against validate_owm.mjs; three visibility violations were found on the initial draft (GEO->Space Regulation, LEO->Space Regulation, Component Manufacturing->Space Supply-Chain Awareness) and fixed by lowering Space Regulation to v=0.36 and Space Supply-Chain Awareness to v=0.10.

Layout-checker rules were walked manually: fixed near-duplicate anchors (Consumers/Corporations/Government spread across ν[0.93,0.97] and ε[0.40,0.58]) and nudged Thermal-Electric Cooling off the 0.50 stage boundary to 0.46.
Final map: 3 anchors + 45 components + 58 edges + 8 evolve markers + 2 notes.
